title: Steepest Descent/Ascent Optimization Algorithm
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of the Steepest Descent (for minimization) or Ascent (for maximization) method for unconstrained convex optimization problems.
elements: Perform Line Search (find step size αₖ)
relationships: Initial guess feeds into gradient computation
Gradient determines the steepest descent/ascent direction
Direction and line search are combined to update the solution
Update loop continues until convergence is met
Convergence check leads to either another iteration or the final solution
